title: SUMMER PROGRAMS - 211info
text: ILLINOIS VALLEY BOYS & GIRLS CLUB SUMMER PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers various summer programs including fitness, field trips, and outdoor activities. May include breakfast, lunch, and/or a snack. 24535 Redwood Highway Kerby, OR 97531 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: After school hours: Monday-Friday 2:30pm-6pm Summer and Non-School Day Hours: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5pm Email (541) 244-8490 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 244-8490 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Youth Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
